Title: Celestial Patch Pocket Tee - Unisex Short Sleeve Crewneck T-Shirt
Description:
Embrace a touch of cosmic wonder with this charming Celestial Pocket Tee. Featuring a beautifully detailed patch pocket print of a serene night sky and crescent moon, this shirt is perfect for those who find magic in the everyday.

  • Comfort & Style: Designed with a classic crewneck fit, this shirt offers effortless comfort while making a subtle, stylish statement. The soft, breathable fabric feels amazing against the skin, making it ideal for all-day wear.
  • Intricate Design: The patch pocket art captures the tranquility of a starlit night, adding a whimsical, handcrafted touch to your wardrobe. It's a conversation starter that speaks to a love for nature and the cosmos.
  • Versatility: Pair it with your favorite jeans, shorts, or joggers. Whether you're heading to a casual outing, running errands, or enjoying a relaxed day at home, this tee is your perfect go-to piece.
  • Perfect Gift: Makes a thoughtful and unique gift for friends, family, or anyone who appreciates minimalist design and cosmic themes.

Material Feel: Crafted from high-quality, soft cotton blend fabric, giving it a smooth, comfortable drape that lasts through many washes.
